banner.text: Beta Launch — LITE and PLUS plans are currently FREE. No credit card required.

hero.subheadline: The all-in-one CRM built exclusively for international education agencies. Manage students, schools, visas, tuition, and branch staff — from one platform, anywhere in the world.

socialProof.label: TRUSTED BY STUDY ABROAD AGENCIES IN

problem.label: THE CHALLENGE
problem.heading: Running an agency shouldn't mean drowning in spreadsheets.
problem.body: Most study abroad agencies manage students in Excel, track commissions in separate files, and report to branch staff by email. As your agency grows, this breaks down fast.
problem.card1Body: Consultations, visas, tuition, and documents in separate files
problem.card2Body: Hours spent consolidating branch reports every week
problem.card3Body: Missed school commission deadlines with no automated tracking

services.label: WHAT EDUBEE DOES
services.heading: Everything your agency needs, in one place.
services.s1Body: From first consultation to re-enrollment — track every student touchpoint across 6 structured workflow stages.
services.s2Body: Organise schools from USA, Canada, Australia, Philippines and more by country, degree, and program.
services.s3Body: Manage travel agencies, insurance providers, and accommodation partners in one view.
services.s4Body: Handle partner agency students and calculate sub-commissions automatically.
services.s5Body: Track tuition per student, per term. Get automated commission payment reminders.
services.s6Body: Connect head office and overseas branches. Track KPIs, daily reports, and payroll.

workflow.label: HOW IT WORKS
workflow.heading: A structured workflow for every student journey.

ai.heading: Smarter consulting, powered by AI.
ai.subheadline: Edubee's AI suite automates routine tasks so your team can focus on building student relationships.
ai.chatbotBody: Multilingual live chat running 24/7. Captures leads automatically and saves them to your CRM.
ai.formBody: Smart intake forms that auto-generate lead files and produce tailored quotations instantly.
ai.studyBody: Generate personalised study plans. Auto-populates visa checklists and school requirement lists.

automation.heading: Stop re-entering data. Start running your agency.
automation.body: One input. Every report. Edubee eliminates duplicate data entry — everything flows automatically into your reports, dashboards, and staff KPIs.

security.heading: Your data is safe with Edubee.
security.s1Body: Servers in a secure data centre with physical access controls and redundant power.
security.s2Body: Only authorised users can access data. Even Edubee staff cannot view your agency's data.
security.s3Body: Data stored across dual distributed databases with automatic scheduled backups.

cta.heading: Ready to streamline your agency?
cta.sub: Start with our free LITE plan today — no credit card required.

hero.heading: Everything your agency needs,
hero.sub: From student management to AI automation — Edubee gives international education agencies the tools to operate at their best.

core.heading: Core Services
core.sub: The essential tools every study abroad agency needs to operate efficiently.

ai.heading: The future of study abroad, powered by AI
ai.sub: New AI tools that automate the repetitive and enhance the human touch.

student.title: Student Management
student.desc: Track every student from first enquiry to graduation. Consultation history, profiles, and 6-stage workflow all in one place.

school.title: School Management
school.desc: Manage your entire school partner database — contracts, fees, commission rates, and application requirements in one searchable hub.

partner.title: Partner Management
partner.desc: Track referral partners, agreements, and commission payouts. Manage every relationship with full transparency.

agency.title: Agency Management
agency.desc: Manage multi-branch agency operations from a single dashboard. Staff access control, performance visibility, and branch-level data.

tuition.title: Tuition & Commission
tuition.desc: Automated commission tracking and invoicing. Know exactly what you're owed — and what's been paid — at a glance.

branch.title: Branch Operations
branch.desc: Connect head office and overseas branches with real-time sync. Same platform, same data, anywhere in the world.

aiChatbot.title: AI Chatbot
aiChatbot.desc: Deploy a 24/7 AI student support assistant. Instantly answer common enquiries, qualify leads, and book consultations — without lifting a finger.

aiForm.title: AI Smart Form
aiForm.desc: Intelligent application forms that auto-complete from existing student data. Reduce errors, save time, and delight students.

aiStudy.title: AI Study Advisor
aiStudy.desc: Personalised course and school recommendations powered by AI. Match each student to the perfect program based on their goals and profile.

hero.heading: Built for how study abroad
hero.sub: Edubee's platform covers every stage of the student journey — from first contact to post-enrollment — with automation that saves hours every week.

workflow.heading: The 6-Stage Student Workflow
workflow.sub: Every student follows a structured journey. Edubee tracks every step — ensuring nothing falls through the cracks.

operations.heading: Automate the routine. Focus on students.
operations.sub: Edubee automatically generates daily, weekly, and monthly reports so your team can focus on consulting, not admin.

marketing.heading: Data-driven marketing, made simple.
marketing.sub: Stop guessing which marketing efforts work. Edubee tracks every lead source and gives you actionable ROI data.
marketing.m1Desc: Track where students come from — web, referrals, social, events
marketing.m2Desc: Monitor enquiry-to-enrollment conversion at every funnel stage
marketing.m3Desc: Know which marketing channels generate the most revenue
marketing.m4Desc: Compare campaign spend against student enrollments attributed

access.heading: Use Edubee from anywhere in the world.
access.sub: Your office PC, home laptop, overseas branch, or mobile — same experience, same data, always in sync.
access.a1Desc: Access Edubee from any browser — Chrome, Safari, Edge. No installation, no updates to manage.
access.a2Desc: Head office, overseas branches, and remote staff all share the same live data. No syncing needed.
access.a3Desc: Switch between English, Korean, Japanese, Chinese, Thai, and Vietnamese instantly from any device.
access.a4Desc: Hosted on enterprise-grade infrastructure with 99.9% uptime SLA and automatic failover.

hero.heading: Built by agency people,
hero.sub: Edubee CRM was founded with a single mission: to give study abroad agencies the tools they need to run efficiently and grow confidently — without the enterprise price tag.

story.heading: From frustration to solution.
story.p1: We recognised that international education agencies were managing complex student journeys across spreadsheets, disconnected tools, and manual email reports.
story.p2: As agencies grew — adding overseas branches, hiring consultants, and working with more schools — this approach broke down. Data was scattered. Commissions were missed. Students fell through the cracks.
story.p3: Edubee brings student management, school database, commission tracking, visa management, branch operations, and marketing analytics into a single cloud-based platform — purpose-built for study abroad agencies.
story.p4: We are headquartered in Melbourne, Australia, and serve agencies across South Korea, Japan, China, Southeast Asia, and beyond.

why.heading: What makes us different.
why.sub: We built Edubee around the realities of running a study abroad agency — not a generic sales team.
why.s1Body: Not a generic CRM. Built exclusively for international education agencies — every feature matches your exact workflow.
why.s2Body: Comparable international CRMs cost $100+/month. Edubee starts free and scales at a fraction of the cost.
why.s3Body: Student management, school database, commissions, accounting, branch operations — no need to switch tools.
why.s4Body: Web-based. Works on your office PC, home laptop, smartphone, or at an overseas branch — same experience everywhere.
why.s5Body: Switch between English, Korean, Japanese, Chinese, Thai, and Vietnamese instantly. Built for multilingual agencies.
why.s6Body: IDC data centre hosting, redundant database backups, strict access controls — your data as secure as a banking system.
why.fy1: You feel that a CRM is necessary but the cost is a barrier
why.fy2: You want to unify head office and branch student management
why.fy3: You are managing growing student numbers with manual spreadsheets
why.fy4: You need multi-branch accounting and payroll in one system
why.fy5: You want data-driven marketing insights without Excel analysis

security.heading: Your data is your most valuable asset.
security.sub: Edubee is built with enterprise-grade security so you can focus on students — not data breaches.
security.s1Body: Servers hosted in a secure Internet Data Centre with physical access controls, fire suppression, redundant power, and 24/7 monitoring.
security.s2Body: Only authorised users can access your data. Edubee staff cannot view your agency data under any circumstances.
security.s3Body: All data stored across two distributed database servers with automatic scheduled backups for full restoration capability.
security.s4Body: Multiple layers of firewall and intrusion detection protect the system. All connections are encrypted via HTTPS/TLS.

hero.heading: We're here to
hero.sub: Find answers in our FAQ or reach out directly — our team responds within one business day.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.sub: Quick answers to the most common questions about Edubee.

contact.responseBody: We aim to respond within 1 business day (Mon–Fri, Melbourne AEST).

pricing.heading: Simple, transparent pricing for every agency.
pricing.sub: No setup fees. No lock-in contracts. Cancel anytime.
pricing.refund1: Free (LITE) plan — Cancel anytime, no cost.
pricing.refund2: Paid plans — Full refund within 7 days of payment.
pricing.refund3: After 7 days: no refund for current period; auto-renewal stops next cycle.
pricing.refund4: No lock-in period. No cancellation fee.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: No. Cancel anytime with no fees. There is no lock-in period.
faq.q2: Can I use Edubee from my phone or tablet?
faq.a2: Yes. Edubee is web-based and works on any internet-connected device.
faq.q3: Can I demo Edubee before paying?
faq.a3: Yes. Sign up for the free LITE plan and access all features immediately.
faq.q4: How quickly can I start after signing up?
faq.a4: The LITE plan activates instantly upon signup.
faq.a5: Yes. IDC dual-redundant servers, automatic backups. Even Edubee staff cannot view your data.
faq.a6: No impact. All data is cloud-based and independent of your device.
faq.q7: Can I import my existing Excel data?
faq.a7: Yes. Contact info@edubee.co for data migration assistance.
faq.q8: Can I set different access levels for staff?
faq.a8: Yes. Set read-only, edit, or delete permissions per menu per staff member.
faq.q9: Can my overseas branch use the same system?
faq.a9: Yes. Same platform, same experience, from any country.
faq.q10: What features are not yet in Beta?
faq.a10: Phone support and remote assistance coming soon, along with BUSINESS and ENTERPRISE plans.

contact.heading: Get in touch
contact.sub: We typically respond within 1 business day via email.
contact.successBody: Thank you. We will get back to you within 1 business day.
contact.betaNote: Currently in Beta — phone and remote support coming soon.
